title: Microsoft Consolidated Financial Baseline (2023-2026)
objective: Extract and tabulate consolidated quarterly financial data from Microsoft's SEC filings (10-Q and 10-K) from April 2023 to March 2026. Include Revenue, Operating Income, Net Income, and EPS. Identify the top-level growth drivers mentioned in the 'Management's Discussion and Analysis' (MD&A) sections for each fiscal year. Avoid blogs and social media.

title: Intelligent Cloud & Azure AI Performance
objective: Analyse the 'Intelligent Cloud' segment performance from April 2023 to March 2026. Specifically track Azure revenue growth rates (constant currency), server products and cloud services revenue, and mentions of Azure AI services adoption. Document key milestones in AI infrastructure scaling and major partnership impacts (e.g., OpenAI) as reported in SEC filings and institutional research. Exclude non-English sources.
search_hints: Microsoft Intelligent Cloud revenue by quarter 2023-2026
Microsoft Azure AI services growth SEC filings
Institutional research Microsoft Azure market share 2024 2025

title: Productivity & Business Processes: The Copilot Rollout
objective: Analyse the 'Productivity and Business Processes' segment from April 2023 to March 2026. Focus on Office 365 Commercial revenue, Microsoft 365 Copilot pricing/monetisation milestones, and adoption metrics. Track performance of LinkedIn and Dynamics 365. Document how Copilot integration is reported to have influenced Average Revenue Per User (ARPU). Prioritize official Microsoft earnings calls and SEC reports.
search_hints: Microsoft Productivity and Business Processes quarterly revenue 2023-2026
Microsoft 365 Copilot adoption metrics earnings calls
Microsoft 365 Copilot monetization strategy institutional research

title: More Personal Computing & AI Integration
objective: Investigate the 'More Personal Computing' segment from April 2023 to March 2026. Cover Windows OEM revenue trends, Surface/Hardware performance, and the impact of the Activision Blizzard acquisition on Gaming revenue. Specifically look for the strategic shift towards 'AI PCs' and Copilot+ integration in Windows. Use SEC filings and credible financial news citing institutional analysts.
search_hints: Microsoft Gaming revenue Activision Blizzard impact 2024
Copilot+ PC market impact Microsoft earnings

title: Capital Expenditure (AI) & Institutional Outlook
objective: Track Microsoft's Capital Expenditures (CapEx) from April 2023 to March 2026, focusing on investments in data centres and AI hardware. Compare this with institutional analyst expectations and sentiment from firms like Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, or JP Morgan. Summarise the 'bull' and 'bear' cases for Microsoft’s AI strategy as presented in institutional research. Avoid social media/blogs.
search_hints: Institutional analyst ratings Microsoft AI strategy 2025
